articles.llm_summary: APEDA exports first GI-tagged Sikkim Dalle Chillies.
articles.title: apeda facilitates export of first gi-tagged dalle chillies
articles.description: APEDA exported the first GI-tagged Dalle Chilly from Sikkim to the Solomon Islands. In collaboration with Sikkim's Agriculture Department and its Guwahati office, APEDA facilitated this export, ensuri...

articles.llm_summary: Belgium 'attaches great importance' to Mehul Choksi case.
articles.title: attach great importance to case: belgium on choksi's residency
articles.description: Reacting to reports of fugitive Indian businessman Mehul Choksi residing in Belgium, the country's foreign affairs ministry told News18 that it "attaches great importance to the case". Choksi, who has...
